历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest science ranking was approximately 4917, in 2023 approximately 6121 (significantly shifted backward), in 2024 approximately 2696 (significantly shifted forward), and in 2025 the physics category ranking was approximately 3388. There has been significant fluctuation over the past four years, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 3388. The university's enrollment plan for the physics category in Ningxia: 28 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 41 in 2025, and 38 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 3 students (-7.3%), and the reduction in plan slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 40th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 38-40 range in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly because a master's graduate thanked the Security Department in their acknowledgments for allowing a scrap collector to enter the school, demonstrating humanistic care and enhancing the university's image; Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 53rd overall), with moderate attention; no obvious record of admission cut-off gaps; Ecology A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-. Grass Science and Ecology are top in the country, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Grass Science (Base Class) and Ecology, making them attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended, Clinical Medicine is recommended, aligning with Lanzhou University's strengths in science and medicine, making related majors highly sought after; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia general college entrance examination is approximately 66,000 (basically unchanged from approximately 65,897 in 2025), with physics category candidates estimated at about 44,200 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 67%, indicating a stable competition landscape; provincial control score line data has been incorporated for reference; Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu, and is in the same northwest region as Ningxia, with close geographical distance and similar culture, providing natural regional appeal to Ningxia candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Ningxia is about 0.5%-0.8%, which is a normal cross-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 3388, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 7.3% (which decreases the ranking number), a slightly positive reputation, and high major popularity (which intensifies competition), the two factors offset each other, resulting in slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3269, with a range of 2779-3759.

Note that Lanzhou University's Grass Science is a national top A+ discipline, and although it is in Tier 3, its disciplinary strength is extremely strong, making it suitable for candidates interested in agriculture, forestry, and ecology to consider seriously.

Although disciplines like Ecology (A+) and Grassland Science (A+) are primarily science-oriented, Lanzhou University, as a comprehensive 985 university, provides a platform that supports its liberal arts majors such as Marxist Theory, Chinese Language and Literature, and History.
